title: Close remaining Rust RPL security findings
description: Complete the eight remaining in-scope Rust RPL production-owner findings: explicit root DAO-origin admission, multicast L2 addressing, exact DaoTxState scope binding, side-effect-free local Announce send, retry-safe Announce relay, link-local DAO relay rejection, automatic DAO send lifecycle with authoritative origin sequence, and regression preservation.
acceptance_criteria: All eight child findings are implemented without compatibility persistence formats or destructive admission retirement; canonical external vectors and existing full-path tests remain; requested fmt, focused tests, strict scoped Clippy, and diff checks pass.
